params.name: The Birth of Tragedy
params.description: The Birth of Tragedy is a philosophical work by German philosopher Friedrich Nietzsche. Through the exploration of ancient Greek tragedy, the book delves into the essence of art and aesthetics, offering profound reflections on life and human existence. In the book, Nietzsche introduces the concepts of the Apollonian and Dionysian spirits, using them as entry points to reinterpret ancient Greek culture from a unique perspective and with insightful language, further exploring the origins, essence, …
